an10.100:1.1: "Dasayime, bhikkhave, dhamme appahāya abhabbo arahattaṁ sacchikātuṁ. Katame dasa? Rāgaṁ, dosaṁ, mohaṁ, kodhaṁ, upanāhaṁ, makkhaṁ, paḷāsaṁ, issaṁ, macchariyaṁ, mānaṁ – ime kho, bhikkhave, dasa dhamme appahāya abhabbo arahattaṁ sacchikātuṁ.
an10.100:2.2:
Dasayime, bhikkhave, dhamme pahāya bhabbo arahattaṁ sacchikātuṁ. Katame dasa? Rāgaṁ, dosaṁ, mohaṁ, kodhaṁ, upanāhaṁ, makkhaṁ, paḷāsaṁ, issaṁ, macchariyaṁ, mānaṁ – ime kho, bhikkhave, dasa dhamme pahāya bhabbo arahattaṁ sacchikātun"ti.
Dasamaṁ.
Upālivaggo pañcamo.
Kāmabhogī bhayaṁ diṭṭhi,
vajjiyamāhituttiyā;
Kokanudo āhuneyyo,
thero upāli abhabboti.
Dutiyo paṇṇāsako samatto.
